title: cirsium galactites
intro: Cirsium galactites, also known as the Milk Thistle Knapweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its silymarin content. The health benefits of Cirsium galactites include protecting the liver from damage, reducing inflammation, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Cirsium galactites often include infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which are used to support liver health and alleviate symptoms associated with liver disease.
